title: Preparation of Chemically Competent Cells
steps: Transfer 1 mL of overnight culture into 50 mL LB in a flask Preparation of LB Media by NUS iGEM
Incubate at 37 °C at 225 rpm until OD600 = 0.6
Transfer culture to 50 mL falcon tube
Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in 30 mL of 0.1 Molarity (M) magnesium chloride solution Preparation of Chemicals by NUS iGEM
Discard supernatant and resuspend pellet in 20 mL of 0.1 Molarity (M) calcium chloride solution Preparation of Chemicals by NUS iGEM
Resuspend pellet in 1.5 mL of cold mixture comprising 20% glycerol and 80% 0.1 Molarity (M) calcium chloride solution
Aliquot 60 µL of mixture into 1.5mL eppendorf tubes
creator: NUS iGEM
